name: account-transaction
description: Portfolio.AccountTransaction tools on the ayunit MCP. UBS Miami activity loader (file → validated trades + cash/GL, live asset/account/lock resolution). Custody-agnostic audit + fix suite: transaction-workday-audit (unregistered assets, structural duplicate clusters, resolvable-now PENDING), pending-revalidate (re-fires the loader validators on PENDING rows whose blockers have cleared), pending-position-repair (repairs PENDING rows with no valid identifier by inferring (Asset, direction) from the AccountPosition ↔ CustodyPosition delta; HIGH-confidence-only autonomous writes with [PR-POS] AgentCheck tag), duplicate-trade-reconcile (de-dup vs CustodyPosition), assetrelated-fix (fills AssetRelated on income, rescues PENDING), compromissada-fix (XP repo normalisation), position-quantity-adjustment (fractional dust absorber).
